titles.title: At the Place Where You Call

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God of love and kindness Your presence in me You cover me with peace In your loving embrace I want none but You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Light of truth and love Shining in me You cover me with peace In your loving embrace Your love is all that I see

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: At the place where You call I worship You Lord Wherever I am I give You my praise At the place where You call I worship You Lord Wherever I am Oh Lord, I worship You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Everywhere I go I praise you Everything I do I lift up My life to you I worship you
